notes: Source: A-SAFE 'Available Base Plates' compatibility matrix PDF (single page, 5-plate × 18-product grid).
Only the 'Standard Zinc nickel, electrophoretic' plate is marked as available to order without additional lead time per the PDF footer — the other four plate types ship on request.
Plate images/dimensions are not on this PDF; dimension + fixing fields have been inferred from A-SAFE's public installation data where certain, otherwise left null.
Compatibility is product-family level — every variant in a family inherits the same plate compatibility.

plates.name: Standard Zinc nickel, electrophoretic
plates.description: A-SAFE's default base plate. Zinc-nickel electrophoretic coating for corrosion resistance in normal indoor and light-outdoor environments. Ships without additional lead time on any product it is compatible with.
plates.substrateNotes: Concrete slab recommended; asphalt not suitable without sub-slab fixing.
plates.imageDescription: Black electrophoretic-coated steel plate with four countersunk bolt recesses and a square profile.

plates.name: Countersunk Bolts
plates.description: Standard plate fitted with countersunk (flush) bolts. Reduces trip hazard and low-clearance vehicle snag risk versus the hex-head default. Available on request — not stocked for same-day despatch.
plates.substrateNotes: Concrete slab recommended. Flush-head fixing ideal where forklift tynes or pedestrians transit directly over the plate.
plates.imageDescription: Black plate with four flush countersunk bolt heads sitting level with the top surface.

plates.name: Stainless Steel 316 Standard
plates.description: Marine-grade 316 stainless steel base plate with standard hex-head fixings. For high-corrosion environments (food and beverage, coastal, chemical, pharma). Available on request.
plates.substrateNotes: Concrete slab recommended. Specify 316 anchors when paired with this plate to avoid galvanic mismatch.
plates.imageDescription: Bright stainless-steel plate with raised hex-head bolts and visible bolt recesses.

plates.name: Stainless Steel 316 Countersunk
plates.description: 316 stainless plate with flush countersunk bolts — combines marine-grade corrosion resistance with a low-profile top surface. Available on request.
plates.substrateNotes: Concrete slab recommended. Combine with 316 anchors in wet / washdown zones.
plates.imageDescription: Bright stainless-steel plate with four flush countersunk bolt heads.

plates.name: Galvanised Steel
plates.description: Hot-dip galvanised heavy-duty steel base plate. Used on the higher-rated Atlas Traffic Barrier and Heavy Duty Bollard ranges where the plate carries significantly more impact load than the standard barrier families. Available on request.
plates.substrateNotes: Reinforced concrete recommended — matches the HD load case of Atlas / HD Bollard products.
plates.imageDescription: Dull-grey galvanised steel plate, thicker than the standard plate, with four raised hex-head bolts.

mFlex Single Traffic - Ground Level: mFlex Single Traffic Barrier - Ground Level
